title: Avoid use of github.com/mattn/go-shellwords in storage/pkg/parsers/kernel/kernel_darwin.go
body: Per https://apple.stackexchange.com/questions/388377/in-which-macos-version-was-the-json-flag-switch-added-in-system-profiler , since 2019 the `system_profiler` command has `-json` option, and nothing indicates the output is supposed to be shell-quoted, so we should be able to parse JSON and drop that dependency.
